Bey Herrn Haag dem Buchbinder in der Augustiner-Gaß sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ludwig Gottfrieds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Beschreibung von Schweden</TITLE>, mit viel schönen Kupferen, <PLACE>Franckfurt</PLACE> <YEAR>1632</YEAR>. <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rollin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Histoire Romaine</TITLE> <VOLUME>II. Tomes</VOLUME>,<PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1744</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Lightfooti</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Horae Hebr. in 4. Evang.</TITLE> <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1684</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Horae Hebr. in Act. Rom. Cor.</TITLE> <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1679</YEAR></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stollens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anleit. zur Historie der Gelehrtheit</TITLE>, <PLACE>Jenä</PLACE> <YEAR>1727</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Walchn</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hist. Critica Ling. Lat.</TITLE> <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Clericus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>in Pentateuch. & Libr. Hist. v. Test.</TITLE> <PLACE>Tubing.</PLACE> <YEAR>1733</YEAR>. <VOLUME>II. Tomi</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Ein Frantzösischer Atlas</TITLE> von <VOLUME>50. Carten</VOLUME></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":16,"explanation":"Fixed encoding artifacts (mojibake) such as '√ü' to 'ß', '√∂' to 'ö', and '√§' to 'ä'. Corrected XML syntax errors including a malformed opening <TITLE> tag and an unescaped ampersand. Corrected OCR errors typical of Fraktur/early printing: 'Lipf' to 'Lips' (long s), '8v6' to '8vo', 'IT'/'11' to 'II' (Roman numerals), 'fct' to 'Act' (Acts of the Apostles), and 'Eyusd' to 'Ejusd'. Standardized 'hori'/'hora' to 'Horae' based on the known work by Lightfoot."}

parsed.explanation: Fixed encoding artifacts (mojibake) such as '√ü' to 'ß', '√∂' to 'ö', and '√§' to 'ä'. Corrected XML syntax errors including a malformed opening <TITLE> tag and an unescaped ampersand. Corrected OCR errors typical of Fraktur/early printing: 'Lipf' to 'Lips' (long s), '8v6' to '8vo', 'IT'/'11' to 'II' (Roman numerals), 'fct' to 'Act' (Acts of the Apostles), and 'Eyusd' to 'Ejusd'. Standardized 'hori'/'hora' to 'Horae' based on the known work by Lightfoot.
